title: Live operations priority sequence should clear a hard constraint before Track
description: A priority live operations sequence should open CCTV review under a hard specialist constraint, clear the constraint, and then resume Tactical Track in the same run.
author: zaks

specialistAssessments.summary: CCTV specialist wants live review to stay open until visual verification is complete.
evidence: Review action is already pinned to the watch event.
Visual verification queue is ready for controller review.

specialistAssessments.summary: Guard Ops specialist requires a controller-held welfare dispatch before route execution continues.
evidence: Wearable telemetry still resembles a distress-shaped welfare pattern.
missingInfo: Fresh guard voice confirmation is still missing.

commandBrainSnapshot.advisory: Hard specialist constraint toward Dispatch Board cleared, so ONYX resumed the next move in Tactical Track.
commandBrainSnapshot.rationale: Scenario replay reopened route execution and staged Tactical Track once the hard specialist constraint cleared.
contextHighlights: Hard specialist constraint toward Dispatch Board cleared before Tactical Track resumed.
Track continuity reopened once route execution returned.

commandBrainTimeline.note: Review evidence staged for INC-LIVEOPS-CHAIN while hard specialist constraint blocked execution toward Dispatch Board.
